failed_attempts.sql:
WITH target_profile AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM profile
    WHERE username = 'eusougabriela'
),
target_publications AS (
    SELECT p.id AS publication_id
    FROM publication p
    JOIN target_profile tp ON p.profile_id = tp.id
)
SELECT 
    c.profile_id AS profile_id,
    c.annotation AS criticism,
    c.num_likes
FROM comment c
JOIN target_publications tp ON c.publication_id = tp.publication_id
WHERE c.annotation ILIKE '%crítica%' 
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%pior%' 
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%odiei%' 
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%ruim%' 
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%horrível%'
ORDER BY c.num_likes DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: canceling statement due to statement timeout

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    c.profile_id AS profile_id,
    c.annotation AS criticism,
    c.num_likes
FROM comment c
JOIN publication p ON c.publication_id = p.id
JOIN profile author ON p.profile_id = author.id
WHERE author.username = 'eusougabriela'
  AND (
    c.annotation ILIKE '%crítica%' 
    OR c.annotation ILIKE '%pior%' 
    OR c.annotation ILIKE '%odiei%' 
    OR c.annotation ILIKE '%ruim%' 
    OR c.annotation ILIKE '%horrível%'
  )
ORDER BY c.num_likes DESC
LIMIT 10;
